chapter_title.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْمُسْتَحَاضَةَ تَطُوفُ بِالْبَيْتِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 153 – The woman experiencing post-childbirth bleeding performs Tawaaf by the House (Kabah)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/100)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/100)
text: الْمُسْتَحَاضَةُ تَطُوفُ بِالْبَيْتِ وَ تُصَلِّي وَ لَا تَدْخُلُ الْكَعْبَةَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Muhammad Bin Aslam, from Yunus Bin Yaqoub, from the one who narrated it,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘The woman experiencing post-childbirth bleeding would perform Tawaaf by the House (Kabah), and she would Pray, and she would not enter the Kabah’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn al-ffusayn from Muhammad ibn Aslam from Yunus from Ya’qub from those who narrated to him who has said the following: “Abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘A woman who experiences Istihadah (a form of menses) can perform Tawaf around the House and Salat (prayer), but she cannot enter the House.’”
